title: Producers and Directors
description: Produce or direct stage, television, radio, video, or film productions for entertainment, information, or instruction. Responsible for creative decisions, such as interpretation of script, choice of actors or guests, set design, sound, special effects, and choreography.

tasks.text: Plan details such as framing, composition, camera movement, sound, and actor movement for each shot or scene.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate to actors the approach, characterization, and movement needed for each scene in such a way that rehearsals and takes are minimized.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct live broadcasts, films and recordings, or non-broadcast programming for public entertainment or education.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research production topics using the internet, video archives, and other informational sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review film, recordings, or rehearsals to ensure conformance to production and broadcast standards.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Study and research scripts to determine how they should be directed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise and coordinate the work of camera, lighting, design, and sound crew members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with technical directors, managers, crew members, and writers to discuss details of production, such as photography, script, music, sets, and costumes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform management activities, such as budgeting, scheduling, planning, and marketing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with writers, producers, or actors about script changes or "workshop" scripts, through rehearsal with writers and actors to create final drafts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and approve equipment and elements required for productions, such as scenery, lights, props, costumes, choreography, and music.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish pace of programs and sequences of scenes according to time requirements and cast and set accessibility.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct meetings with staff to discuss production progress and to ensure production objectives are attained.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile scripts, program notes, and other material related to productions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve personnel problems that arise during the production process by acting as liaisons between dissenting parties when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate the activities of writers, directors, managers, and other personnel throughout the production process.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain rights to scripts or to such items as existing video footage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write and submit proposals to bid on contracts for projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compose and edit scripts or provide screenwriters with story outlines from which scripts can be written.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cut and edit film or tape to integrate component parts into desired sequences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write and edit news stories from information collected by reporters and other sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Choose settings and locations for films and determine how scenes will be shot in these settings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review film daily to check on work in progress and to plan for future filming.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate with parties, including independent producers and the distributors and broadcasters who will be handling completed productions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as preparing operational reports, distributing rehearsal call sheets and script copies, and arranging for rehearsal quarters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop marketing plans for finished products, collaborating with sales associates to supervise product distribution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange financing for productions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hire principal cast members and crew members, such as art directors, cinematographers, and costume designers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hold auditions for parts or negotiate contracts with actors determined suitable for specific roles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select plays, scripts, books, news content, or ideas to be produced.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
